sources: Walrus uses erasure coding to split files into encoded shards, requiring only a fraction of shards for reconstruction.
It is a decentralized blob store natively integrated with the Sui blockchain for coordination, access control, and micropayments.
Storage nodes must periodically prove they hold their shards, with slashing penalties for those that fail to provide timely proofs.

report: Walrus is a decentralized blob store natively integrated with the Sui blockchain for coordination, access control, and micropayments. It uses erasure coding to split files into encoded shards, requiring only a fraction of those shards for reconstruction. Storage nodes must periodically prove they hold their shards, with slashing penalties applied to those that fail to provide timely proofs.
